title: thalictrum tuberiferum var. tenerum
intro: Thalictrum tuberiferum var. tenerum, also known as the meadow rue or meadow cleaver, is a perennial flowering plant of the genus Thalictrum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of meadow rue include reducing swelling and pain, treating urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Meadow rue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support women's health and alleviate symptoms of PMS and menopause.
